title: Pandemonium Bosses
description: This data pack adds new fun bosses to fight
body:
# Pandemonium Bosses

## Challenge yourself against bosses of great destruction and chaos!

Music by: [Juhani Junkala](https://www.free-stock-music.com/artist.juhani-junkala.html)

This Datapack adds:
- 2 new bosses
- A new weapon
- A new enchantment


<details>
<summary>Boss summon instructions</summary>
Craft the boss summoning items, then throw them on the altar as shown below.

**Crafting Recipes:**

![Boss summon item](https://i.ibb.co.com/qMJwv5D/Recipe1.png)
![Boss summon item](https://i.ibb.co.com/1MDgDFY/Recipe2.png)

**Summon Altars:**

![Summoning altar](https://i.ibb.co.com/SfwY5rq/Summon-Altar1.png)
![Summoning altar](https://i.ibb.co.com/xJyHfH6/Summon-Altar2.png)

</details>


Feedbacks would be very appreciated!
